transportedTraceSpace.name: X_aug
transportedTraceSpace.definition: closure Ran(R_aug) with quotient norm inf{||f||_V:R_aug f=x}

closedFormTransportLimitInputStatus.label: closed-form transport limit input
closedFormTransportLimitInputStatus.reason: The transport-limit theorem proves that the finite augmented repairs have a nonnegative closed-form limit D_aug on X_aug and that the repaired augmented form is closed and nonnegative.

positiveVolterraTailInputStatus.label: positive Volterra tail input
positiveVolterraTailInputStatus.reason: The positive Volterra tail theorem proves the diagonal tail form P-M>=0 on the completed trace-fiber domain.  It is the narrow input needed here and sits below the original Weyl/KLM packaging.

boundedNonnegativeRepairStatus.label: bounded nonnegative transported repair
boundedNonnegativeRepairStatus.reason: The closed-form transport-limit theorem gives D_aug>=0 on X_aug, and the positive Volterra tail theorem supplies the remaining completed-domain nonnegative tail input.

closedRepairedAugmentedFormStatus.label: closed repaired augmented form
closedRepairedAugmentedFormStatus.reason: K+R_aug^*D_aug R_aug is the closed-form limit of nonnegative finite repaired forms, hence is nonnegative on the completed augmented trace-fiber domain.

proof: Import the closed-form transport-limit theorem for D_aug>=0 on X_aug.
Import the positive Volterra tail theorem.
Conclude the augmented repair is a bounded nonnegative closed form on the completed domain.
